# Cross-modality: spatial, bulk, and divergence checks {#sec-crossmodality}

```{r}
#| label: crossmodality-setup
#| include: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
})
options(warn = 2)
targets::tar_source()
targets::tar_load(c(crossmodality_report, crossmodality_figures)) # compact targets only, no heavy modality objects
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)
theme_set(theme_tau())

cmr <- crossmodality_report
cmf <- crossmodality_figures
alpha <- cmr$provenance$alpha
focus <- cmr$provenance$focus_contrasts
contrast_labels <- c(
  tau_alone = "tau alone",
  nlgf_in_maptki = "amyloid on MAPTKI",
  nlgf_in_p301s = "amyloid on P301S",
  tau_in_nlgf = "tau in NLGF",
  interaction = "interaction"
)
layer_labels <- c(
  proteome = "proteome",
  phospho_raw = "raw phospho",
  phospho_corrected = "corrected phospho"
)
modality_levels <- c("snRNAseq microglia", "GeoMx spatial",
                     "bulk proteome", "bulk phosphoproteome")
axis_labels <- c(
  DAM = "DAM",
  homeostatic = "homeostatic",
  synaptic = "synaptic",
  clearance = "clearance",
  complement = "complement",
  antigen_presentation = "antigen presentation",
  MHC_APC = "MHC/APC",
  IFN = "IFN",
  NFkB = "NF-kB",
  Myc = "Myc",
  Proliferative = "proliferative",
  other = "other"
)
fmt_p <- function(p) {
  out <- rep("-", length(p))
  ok <- is.finite(p)
  out[ok] <- ifelse(p[ok] < 0.001,
                    formatC(p[ok], format = "e", digits = 2),
                    formatC(p[ok], format = "f", digits = 3))
  out
}
fmt_num <- function(x, digits = 2) ifelse(is.finite(x), formatC(x, format = "f", digits = digits), "-")
fmt_int <- function(x) format(as.integer(round(x)), big.mark = ",", trim = TRUE)
short_label <- function(x, n = 46L) {
  x <- gsub("^GO[A-Z]*_", "", x)
  x <- gsub("_", " ", x)
  ifelse(nchar(x) > n, paste0(substr(x, 1L, n - 3L), "..."), x)
}
wrap_label <- function(x, width = 22L) {
  vapply(as.character(x), function(s) {
    z <- strwrap(s, width = width)
    if (length(z)) paste(z, collapse = "\n") else s
  }, character(1), USE.NAMES = FALSE)
}
plot_contrast <- function(x, levels = focus, reverse = FALSE) {
  lv <- if (reverse) rev(levels) else levels
  factor(x, levels = lv, labels = unname(contrast_labels[lv]))
}
fmt_axis <- function(x) {
  vapply(strsplit(as.character(x), ";", fixed = TRUE), function(parts) {
    lab <- axis_labels[parts]
    lab[is.na(lab)] <- parts[is.na(lab)]
    paste(unname(lab), collapse = " / ")
  }, character(1), USE.NAMES = FALSE)
}
fmt_pair <- function(x) gsub("_", "-", x, fixed = TRUE)
one_row <- function(d, idx, label) {
  out <- d[idx, , drop = FALSE]
  stopifnot(nrow(out) >= 1L)
  out[1L, , drop = FALSE]
}

geom_counts <- cmr$geomx$counts
bulk_counts <- cmr$bulk$significant_counts
bulk_features <- cmr$bulk$feature_counts
run_index <- cmr$bulk$run_index
decon <- cmr$clearance$spatial_decon
pairs <- cmr$clearance$pair_support
contrast_summary <- cmr$divergence$contrast_summary

geo_volc_points <- cmf$geomx_volcano$points
geo_volc_points$contrast <- plot_contrast(geo_volc_points$contrast)
geo_volc_points$direction <- factor(as.character(geo_volc_points$direction),
                                    levels = c("down", "not significant", "up"))
geo_volc_lab <- cmf$geomx_volcano$labels
geo_volc_lab$contrast <- plot_contrast(geo_volc_lab$contrast)

geo_sens <- cmf$geomx_sensitivity
geo_sens <- geo_sens[geo_sens$contrast %in% focus, , drop = FALSE]
geo_sens$contrast <- plot_contrast(geo_sens$contrast)
geo_sens$fit_label <- c(unblocked = "unblocked AOI",
                        collapsed_bio_unit = "bio-unit collapsed")[geo_sens$fit]
geo_sens$fit_label[is.na(geo_sens$fit_label)] <- geo_sens$fit[is.na(geo_sens$fit_label)]
geo_sens$fit_label <- factor(geo_sens$fit_label,
                             levels = c("unblocked AOI", "bio-unit collapsed"))
geo_sens_long <- rbind(
  data.frame(geo_sens[c("fit_label", "contrast")],
             metric = "lost from primary", n = -geo_sens$n_lost,
             stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
  data.frame(geo_sens[c("fit_label", "contrast")],
             metric = "gained in sensitivity", n = geo_sens$n_gained,
             stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
)
geo_sens_long$metric <- factor(geo_sens_long$metric,
                               levels = c("lost from primary", "gained in sensitivity"))

pc_points <- cmf$phospho_raw_corrected$points
pc_points$contrast <- plot_contrast(pc_points$contrast)
pc_points$status <- factor(as.character(pc_points$status),
                           levels = c("not significant", "raw only", "corrected only", "both"))
pc_lab <- cmf$phospho_raw_corrected$labels
pc_lab$best_fdr <- pmin(pc_lab$raw_fdr, pc_lab$corrected_fdr)
pc_lab <- do.call(rbind, lapply(split(pc_lab, pc_lab$contrast, drop = TRUE), function(d) {
  d <- d[order(d$best_fdr, -abs(d$raw_logFC) - abs(d$corrected_logFC),
               d$site_id, method = "radix", na.last = TRUE), , drop = FALSE]
  head(d, 6L)
}))
pc_lab$contrast <- plot_contrast(pc_lab$contrast)
pc_lab$site_label <- wrap_label(gsub("_", " ", pc_lab$site_id, fixed = TRUE), 14L)

four_counts <- cmf$four_modality_counts
four_counts$contrast <- plot_contrast(four_counts$contrast)
four_counts$modality <- factor(four_counts$modality, levels = rev(modality_levels))
four_counts$label <- fmt_int(four_counts$n_sig)

four_paths <- cmf$four_modality_pathways
four_paths$contrast <- plot_contrast(four_paths$contrast)
four_paths$axis_label <- fmt_axis(four_paths$axis)
path_rank <- stats::aggregate(cbind(n_modalities_sig, n_modalities_present, rank_score) ~ axis_label,
                              data = four_paths, FUN = max)
path_rank <- path_rank[order(-path_rank$n_modalities_sig, -path_rank$n_modalities_present,
                             -path_rank$rank_score, path_rank$axis_label,
                             method = "radix", na.last = TRUE), , drop = FALSE]
four_paths$axis_label <- factor(four_paths$axis_label, levels = rev(path_rank$axis_label))
four_paths$direction <- factor(as.character(four_paths$direction),
                               levels = c("positive", "negative", "mixed", "none"))
four_paths$label <- ifelse(four_paths$n_modalities_sig > 0L,
                           four_paths$n_modalities_sig, "")
four_path_max_sig <- max(4L, max(four_paths$n_modalities_sig, na.rm = TRUE))

four_symbols <- cmf$four_modality_symbols
four_symbols$contrast <- plot_contrast(four_symbols$contrast)
four_symbols$modality <- factor(four_symbols$modality, levels = modality_levels)
four_symbols$symbol_label <- wrap_label(gsub(";", " / ", four_symbols$symbol_axis, fixed = TRUE), 18L)
sym_rank <- unique(four_symbols[order(match(four_symbols$contrast, levels(four_symbols$contrast)),
                                      -four_symbols$n_modalities_present,
                                      -four_symbols$n_modalities_sig,
                                      four_symbols$symbol_label,
                                      method = "radix", na.last = TRUE), "symbol_label"])
four_symbols$symbol_label <- factor(four_symbols$symbol_label, levels = rev(sym_rank))

geo_int <- one_row(geom_counts, geom_counts$contrast == "interaction", "GeoMx interaction counts")
geo_amy_k <- one_row(geom_counts, geom_counts$contrast == "nlgf_in_maptki", "GeoMx amyloid MAPTKI counts")
geo_amy_p <- one_row(geom_counts, geom_counts$contrast == "nlgf_in_p301s", "GeoMx amyloid P301S counts")
bulk_primary_sig <- sum(run_index$n_primary_sig, na.rm = TRUE)
bulk_lost <- sum(run_index$n_lost_or_flipped, na.rm = TRUE)
bulk_loss_pct <- if (bulk_primary_sig > 0) round(100 * bulk_lost / bulk_primary_sig, 1) else 0
worst_run <- run_index[order(-run_index$n_lost_or_flipped, run_index$layer,
                             match(run_index$contrast, names(contrast_labels)),
                             method = "radix", na.last = TRUE), , drop = FALSE][1L, ]
decon_reasons <- if (length(decon$reasons)) paste(decon$reasons, collapse = "; ") else "no blocking reason recorded"
decon_unresolved <- if (is.list(decon$decon) && is.data.frame(decon$decon$unresolved_aoi)) {
  decon$decon$unresolved_aoi
} else {
  data.frame()
}
decon_unresolved_n <- if (nrow(decon_unresolved)) length(unique(decon_unresolved$aoi)) else 0L
decon_unresolved_sentence <- if (decon_unresolved_n > 0L) {
  paste0(decon_unresolved_n, " AOIs have near-zero total beta in the attempted fit")
} else {
  decon_reasons
}
decon_ref <- if (is.data.frame(decon$reference) && nrow(decon$reference)) decon$reference else data.frame()
decon_ref_sentence <- if (nrow(decon_ref)) {
  paste0(
    paste0(decon_ref$arm, " profile ", decon_ref$status, " (",
           fmt_int(decon_ref$n_genes), " genes x ", decon_ref$n_profiles,
           " profiles, max |cor| ", fmt_num(decon_ref$max_abs_correlation, 2), ")"),
    collapse = "; "
  )
} else {
  "reference-profile summary unavailable in this compact bundle"
}
decon_nuclei_sentence <- if (is.list(decon$decon) && is.list(decon$decon$nuclei) &&
                             isFALSE(decon$decon$nuclei$absolute_rescaling_enabled)) {
  paste0("Nuclei-rescaled absolute cell counts remain disabled",
         if (is.finite(decon$decon$nuclei$n_sentinel %||% NA_real_)) {
           paste0(" (", decon$decon$nuclei$n_sentinel, " sentinel nuclei values)")
         } else {
           ""
         })
} else {
  "Nuclei-rescaled absolute cell counts are not used"
}
decon_audit <- if (is.list(decon$residual_audit) && is.data.frame(decon$residual_audit$summary)) {
  decon$residual_audit$summary
} else {
  data.frame()
}
decon_audit_sentence <- if (nrow(decon_audit) && any(is.finite(decon_audit$median_metric))) {
  paste0("residual QC remains available (median RMS residual ",
         paste(paste0(decon_audit$arm, " ", fmt_num(decon_audit$median_metric, 3)),
               collapse = "; "), ")")
} else {
  "residual QC is unavailable"
}
earned_pairs <- pairs[pairs$status == "earned", , drop = FALSE]
earned_sentence <- if (nrow(earned_pairs)) {
  paste0(paste(unique(earned_pairs$pair), collapse = ", "), " in ",
         paste(contrast_labels[earned_pairs$contrast], collapse = ", "))
} else {
  "no pair"
}
fmt_modalities <- function(x) {
  z <- unlist(strsplit(x, ";", fixed = TRUE), use.names = FALSE)
  z <- z[nzchar(z)]
  z <- gsub("_", " ", z, fixed = TRUE)
  paste(z, collapse = ", ")
}
earned_details <- if (nrow(earned_pairs)) {
  vapply(seq_len(nrow(earned_pairs)), function(i) {
    ep <- earned_pairs[i, , drop = FALSE]
    mods <- fmt_modalities(ep$coherent_supported_modalities)
    paste0(fmt_pair(ep$pair), " in ", contrast_labels[ep$contrast],
           if (nzchar(mods)) paste0(" (supported by ", mods, ")") else "")
  }, character(1))
} else {
  character()
}
earned_detail_sentence <- if (length(earned_details)) {
  paste0(if (length(earned_details) == 1L) "The earned row is " else "The earned rows are ",
         paste(earned_details, collapse = "; "), ".")
} else {
  "No measured pair earns a communication claim under the CCC-lite rule."
}
earned_pair_names <- unique(earned_pairs$pair)
closing_support_phrase <- if (length(earned_pair_names)) {
  "DAM activation, synaptic suppression and the earned clearance-axis support"
} else {
  "DAM activation and synaptic suppression, with clearance kept descriptive"
}
```

## Integrated Four-Modality Views

```{r}
#| label: fig-crossmodality-four-modality-counts
#| fig-width: 9.2
#| fig-height: 4.7
#| fig-cap: "FDR support spans the four assay families."
#| fig-alt: "A four by four heatmap shows significant symbol counts by contrast across snRNAseq microglia, GeoMx spatial, bulk proteome and bulk phosphoproteome."
ggplot(four_counts, aes(contrast, modality)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = log_n_sig), colour = "#F8F6F1", linewidth = 0.25,
            width = 0.94, height = 0.94) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3.0, colour = "#262B2F") +
  scale_fill_rwb(name = "log10(n + 1)") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Four-modality FDR support by contrast") +
  coord_equal(ratio = 0.82) +
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 28, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-crossmodality-four-modality-pathways
#| fig-width: 9.4
#| fig-height: 5.4
#| fig-cap: "Pathway axes summarize four-modality support."
#| fig-alt: "A heatmap shows pathway axes by contrast, with labels encoding the number of significant modalities and fill encoding direction."
ggplot(four_paths, aes(contrast, axis_label)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = direction), colour = "#F8F6F1", linewidth = 0.25,
            width = 0.94, height = 0.94) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 2.35, colour = "#F8F5ED", fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(positive = "#A63A50", negative = "#2F78A0",
                               mixed = "#C8841C", none = "#D7D3CA"),
                    drop = FALSE, name = "direction") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Pathway-level support across assay families") +
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 28, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-crossmodality-four-modality-symbols
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 7.2
#| fig-cap: "Axis genes show measured and significant modalities."
#| fig-alt: "Faceted heatmaps show selected axis genes against the four assay families; fill distinguishes absent, measured and FDR-significant support."
ggplot(four_symbols, aes(modality, symbol_label, fill = status)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = status), colour = "#F8F6F1", linewidth = 0.25,
            width = 0.94, height = 0.94) +
  facet_wrap(~ contrast, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(`not observed` = "#D7D3CA",
                               measured = "#3F5F7F",
                               `FDR < 0.10` = "#A63A50"),
                    drop = FALSE, name = NULL) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Selected axis symbols across modalities") +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 28, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "bottom")
```

## GeoMx Spatial DE

```{r}
#| label: fig-crossmodality-geomx-counts
#| fig-width: 8.8
#| fig-height: 4.2
#| fig-cap: "GeoMx DE counts are largest in amyloid contrasts."
#| fig-alt: "Direct-labelled diverging point stems show GeoMx up and down DE counts for focal contrasts."
geo_plot <- geom_counts[geom_counts$contrast %in% focus, , drop = FALSE]
geo_long <- rbind(
  data.frame(contrast = geo_plot$contrast, direction = "up", n = geo_plot$n_up_fdr_0_10),
  data.frame(contrast = geo_plot$contrast, direction = "down", n = geo_plot$n_down_fdr_0_10)
)
geo_long$contrast <- plot_contrast(geo_long$contrast, reverse = TRUE)
geo_long$direction <- factor(geo_long$direction, levels = c("up", "down"))
geo_long$n_signed <- ifelse(geo_long$direction == "down", -geo_long$n, geo_long$n)
geo_max <- max(1, max(abs(geo_long$n_signed), na.rm = TRUE))
geo_pad <- geo_max * 0.04
geo_long$label <- ifelse(geo_long$n == 0, "", fmt_int(geo_long$n))
geo_long$label_x <- geo_long$n_signed + ifelse(geo_long$n_signed < 0, -geo_pad, geo_pad)
geo_long$label_hjust <- ifelse(geo_long$n_signed < 0, 1, 0)

ggplot(geo_long, aes(n_signed, contrast, colour = direction)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "grey65", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = n_signed, yend = contrast),
               linewidth = 0.62, alpha = 0.86) +
  geom_point(size = 2.8) +
  geom_text(aes(x = label_x, label = label, hjust = label_hjust),
            size = 3.0, colour = "#333333") +
  scale_colour_manual(values = tau_direction_colours, name = "direction") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) fmt_int(abs(x))) +
  labs(x = "GeoMx rows at FDR < 0.10", y = NULL,
       title = "Spatial DE is strongest for amyloid") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-geo_max * 1.22, geo_max * 1.22), clip = "off") +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-crossmodality-geomx-volcano
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6
#| fig-cap: "GeoMx primary volcanoes show dense amyloid structure."
#| fig-alt: "Faceted point volcanoes show GeoMx effect and FDR structure by contrast."
ggplot(geo_volc_points, aes(effect, neg_log10_fdr)) +
  geom_point(aes(colour = direction), size = 0.42, alpha = 0.58) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "grey65", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(alpha), linetype = "dashed",
             colour = "grey70", linewidth = 0.25) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = geo_volc_lab,
    aes(effect, neg_log10_fdr, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 2.25,
    seed = 42L,
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    min.segment.length = 0,
    box.padding = 0.12
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ contrast, ncol = 2) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(down = tau_direction_colours[["down"]],
                                 `not significant` = "#B7B1A5",
                                 up = tau_direction_colours[["up"]]),
                      drop = FALSE, name = NULL) +
  labs(x = "GeoMx log2 fold-change", y = "-log10 FDR",
       title = "GeoMx primary spatial DE by contrast") +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-crossmodality-geomx-sensitivity
#| fig-width: 9.2
#| fig-height: 4.8
#| fig-cap: "GeoMx sensitivity marks rows gained or lost versus the primary model."
#| fig-alt: "Direct-labelled diverging point stems show GeoMx rows lost from or gained versus the primary model."
geo_sens_plot <- geo_sens_long
geo_sens_plot$contrast <- factor(as.character(geo_sens_plot$contrast),
                                 levels = rev(levels(geo_sens_long$contrast)))
geo_sens_max <- max(1, max(abs(geo_sens_plot$n), na.rm = TRUE))
geo_sens_pad <- geo_sens_max * 0.04
geo_sens_plot$label <- ifelse(abs(geo_sens_plot$n) == 0, "", fmt_int(abs(geo_sens_plot$n)))
geo_sens_plot$label_x <- geo_sens_plot$n + ifelse(geo_sens_plot$n < 0, -geo_sens_pad, geo_sens_pad)
geo_sens_plot$label_hjust <- ifelse(geo_sens_plot$n < 0, 1, 0)

ggplot(geo_sens_plot, aes(n, contrast, colour = metric)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "grey65", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = n, yend = contrast),
               linewidth = 0.62, alpha = 0.86) +
  geom_point(size = 2.8) +
  geom_text(aes(x = label_x, label = label, hjust = label_hjust),
            size = 2.95, colour = "#333333") +
  facet_wrap(~ fit_label, nrow = 1) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(`lost from primary` = "#A63A50",
                                 `gained in sensitivity` = "#0B6F7E"),
                      name = NULL) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) fmt_int(abs(x))) +
  labs(x = "GeoMx rows changed at FDR < 0.10", y = NULL,
       title = "Spatial DE support depends on the replicate treatment") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-geo_sens_max * 1.22, geo_sens_max * 1.22), clip = "off") +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom")
```

## Bulk Proteome And Phospho

```{r}
#| label: fig-crossmodality-bulk-counts
#| fig-width: 9
#| fig-height: 4.4
#| fig-cap: "Bulk omics FDR counts are corroborative, not microglia-sorted."
#| fig-alt: "Direct-labelled point stems show bulk proteome and phospho FDR counts by focal contrast."
bp <- bulk_counts[bulk_counts$contrast %in% focus, , drop = FALSE]
bp$contrast <- plot_contrast(bp$contrast, reverse = TRUE)
bp$layer <- factor(bp$layer, levels = names(layer_labels), labels = unname(layer_labels))
bp_max <- max(1, max(bp$n_fdr_0_10, na.rm = TRUE))
bp_pad <- bp_max * 0.03
bp$label <- ifelse(bp$n_fdr_0_10 == 0, "", fmt_int(bp$n_fdr_0_10))

ggplot(bp, aes(n_fdr_0_10, contrast, colour = layer)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = n_fdr_0_10, yend = contrast),
               linewidth = 0.62, alpha = 0.86) +
  geom_point(size = 2.8) +
  geom_text(aes(x = n_fdr_0_10 + bp_pad, label = label),
            hjust = 0, size = 2.95, colour = "#333333") +
  facet_wrap(~ layer, nrow = 1) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(proteome = "#3F5F7F",
                                 `raw phospho` = "#0B7A75",
                                 `corrected phospho` = "#7D5CB8"),
                      guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "features at FDR < 0.10", y = NULL,
       title = "Bulk significance is largest in amyloid contrasts") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, bp_max * 1.16), clip = "off") +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank())
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-crossmodality-phospho-correction
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 7
#| fig-cap: "Parent correction changes bulk phosphosite effect geometry."
#| fig-alt: "Faceted scatter plots compare raw and parent-corrected phosphosite effects."
ggplot(pc_points, aes(raw_logFC, corrected_logFC)) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, colour = "grey65", linewidth = 0.35) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "grey80", linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "grey80", linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_point(aes(colour = status), size = 0.36, alpha = 0.42) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = pc_lab,
    aes(raw_logFC, corrected_logFC, label = site_label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 2.1,
    seed = 42L,
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    min.segment.length = 0,
    box.padding = 0.12
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ contrast, ncol = 2) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(`not significant` = "#B7B1A5",
                                 `raw only` = "#3F5F7F",
                                 `corrected only` = "#0B7A75",
                                 both = "#A63A50"),
                      drop = FALSE, name = NULL) +
  labs(x = "raw phosphosite log2 fold-change",
       y = "parent-corrected phosphosite log2 fold-change",
       title = "Parent correction changes phosphosite effect geometry") +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom")
```
